response.justification: While the candidate has 20+ years of solid engineering experience across multiple domains and recently joined an AI-focused team, they lack the demonstrated principal-engineer-level impact and recognized AI expertise required for a director-level AI strategy role. Current AI exposure is less than one year old and appears incidental to broader infrastructure work rather than a core specialization.
strengths: 20+ years of proven full-stack and infrastructure engineering across diverse platforms and languages
Recent hands-on experience with AI infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong track record of building and teaching: founded GISCollective platform, created workshops, maintains open-source projects
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (less than 1 year) with no prior demonstrated AI products or platforms built
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; no evidence of specialized AI training or depth
No clear principal engineer or director-level track record; background is senior/staff individual contributor level
